# Grocery Flywheel

> Local-first grocery & household replenishment that cuts decision fatigue and turns purchase history into smarter carts.

## What it is
A local-first replenishment engine: observe inventory, capture usage signals, preserve preferences, and recommend the next restock with an approval boundary.

## Install / use
Python; clone and install per the repo's pyproject.

## Links
- Repository: https://github.com/simongonzalezdc/grocery-flywheel
